item.title: Fat File Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Fat File Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Fat File Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Want to download advanced Data Revival software for business purpose? Visit www.filerecoverysoftware.biz website to get Fat File Recovery Freeware program to regain all deleted business documents from damaged storage media. Technical Picture Restoration utility is designed to rescue damaged folders, snaps, digital images and other important data that was lost due to accidental formation from hard disk.

[read more]

item.title: Standard Barcode Maker Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Standard Barcode Maker Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: professionalbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Standard Barcode Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Install standard Barcode Maker tool for company that creates bulk barcode list using random, sequential or constant list generating functions in short time period. Sophisticated tag producing application generates industrial level barcode images in bulk quantity for labeling all industrial products in multiple colors and font styles without needing any expert help or support.

[read more]
item.description:
Standard Barcode Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Install standard Barcode Maker tool for company that creates bulk barcode list using random, sequential or constant list generating functions in short time period. Sophisticated tag producing application generates industrial level barcode images in bulk quantity for labeling all industrial products in multiple colors and font styles without needing any expert help or support.

[read more]

Standard Barcode Maker Tool
(Office Apps)
Install standard Barcode Maker tool for company that creates bulk barcode list using random, sequential or constant list generating functions in short time period. Sophisticated tag producing application generates industrial level barcode images in bulk quantity for labeling all industrial products in multiple colors and font styles without needing any expert help or support.

[read more]

item.title: Softaken EML To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken EML To PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: softaken-tools
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken EML To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Download Softaken EML to PST Converter for exporting EML file to PST format without any errors. This software is professional solution for both the professional as well as non-professional. This software has magnificent features which can attract you towards this tool. Moreover tool supports EML platforms also. With the help of this software you can export in bulk from EML to PST format. Whereas it’s working functions are so fluent in use. Your data safety is the first priority of this software. After the conversion it shows you the complete view of exported data. Users will smoothly run this application at your system. It is compatible with all Outlook editions of Window and MS Outlook. Therefore you can download its demo version for your ease. Whereas this software supports Apple mail EMLX to PST without any interruption.
Key Features of EML To PST:-

• Provide you an instant view of your exported data.
• You can export selective EML file to PST without any complications.
• With this software you can export EML file in multiple platforms.
• This application has user friendly interface.
• You will get 24/7 technical support from the team.
[read more]
item.description:
Softaken EML To PST Converter
(Utilities)
Download Softaken EML to PST Converter for exporting EML file to PST format without any errors. This software is professional solution for both the professional as well as non-professional. This software has magnificent features which can attract you towards this tool. Moreover tool supports EML platforms also. With the help of this software you can export in bulk from EML to PST format. Whereas it’s working functions are so fluent in use. Your data safety is the first priority of this software. • This application has user friendly interface.

[read more]

Download Softaken EML to PST Converter for exporting EML file to PST format without any errors. This software is professional solution for both the professional as well as non-professional. This software has magnificent features which can attract you towards this tool. Moreover tool supports EML platforms also. With the help of this software you can export in bulk from EML to PST format. Whereas it’s working functions are so fluent in use. Your data safety is the first priority of this software. After the conversion it shows you the complete view of exported data. Users will smoothly run this application at your system. It is compatible with all Outlook editions of Window and MS Outlook. Therefore you can download its demo version for your ease. Whereas this software supports Apple mail EMLX to PST without any interruption.
Key Features of EML To PST:-

• Provide you an instant view of your exported data.

item.title: USB Media Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Media Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
USB Media Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Excellent data retrieval application easily locates and restores deleted picture, photo, video files from logically corrupted removable drive in less time. Just visit website www.driverecoverysoftware.org downloads USB Media Data Recovery Software and install on your system in few clicks which support advance inbuilt disk scanning feature enable fast and safe regaining of all lost data from formatted flash disk in few minute. File retrieval program provide attractive graphical interface to easy navigation and user gets back all erased document from thumb drive in simplest way.
[read more]
item.description:
USB Media Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Excellent data retrieval application easily locates and restores deleted picture, photo, video files from logically corrupted removable drive in less time. Just visit website www.driverecoverysoftware.org downloads USB Media Data Recovery Software and install on your system in few clicks which support advance inbuilt disk scanning feature enable fast and safe regaining of all lost data from formatted flash disk in few minute. File retrieval program provide attractive graphical interface to easy navigation and user gets back all erased document from thumb drive in simplest way.
[read more]

USB Media Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Excellent data retrieval application easily locates and restores deleted picture, photo, video files from logically corrupted removable drive in less time. Just visit website www.driverecoverysoftware.org downloads USB Media Data Recovery Software and install on your system in few clicks which support advance inbuilt disk scanning feature enable fast and safe regaining of all lost data from formatted flash disk in few minute. File retrieval program provide attractive graphical interface to easy navigation and user gets back all erased document from thumb drive in simplest way.

item.title: Professional Barcode Label Creator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Professional Barcode Label Creator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: professionalbarcode
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Barcode Label Creator
(Office Apps)
Easily download Barcode Maker Post Office application from www.barcodemaker.org that provide complete solution with affordable and effective capabilities to design and generate printable or scannable new book edition barcode with using linear and 2D fonts or multicolor. With advance printing setting barcode labeling tool helps to generate company product barcode tags that easily print multi-copies of same coupons in a single paper with supports any printer. Label generator utility help to create and design customized barcode stickers, roll, tags for tracking the postal service and banking industry barcode labeling needs in minimum time and efforts without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.description:
Professional Barcode Label Creator
(Office Apps)
Easily download Barcode Maker Post Office application from www.barcodemaker.org that provide complete solution with affordable and effective capabilities to design and generate printable or scannable new book edition barcode with using linear and 2D fonts or multicolor. With advance printing setting barcode labeling tool helps to generate company product barcode tags that easily print multi-copies of same coupons in a single paper with supports any printer. Label generator utility help to create and design customized barcode stickers, roll, tags for tracking the postal service and banking industry barcode labeling needs in minimum time and efforts without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional Barcode Label Creator
(Office Apps)
Easily download Barcode Maker Post Office application from www.barcodemaker.org that provide complete solution with affordable and effective capabilities to design and generate printable or scannable new book edition barcode with using linear and 2D fonts or multicolor. With advance printing setting barcode labeling tool helps to generate company product barcode tags that easily print multi-copies of same coupons in a single paper with supports any printer. Label generator utility help to create and design customized barcode stickers, roll, tags for tracking the postal service and banking industry barcode labeling needs in minimum time and efforts without any expert guidance.

[read more]

item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: NTFS File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
NTFS file recovery application is useful to retrieve corrupted photographs, wallpapers, screensaver, text file, images, audio, video, official document or other important files from all major types of hard drive including SATA, SCSI, ATA, IDE, EIDE. Data restoration software is capable to regain erased text file which run on various Windows tool like excel sheet, office word file, pdf file, ppt or other documents file in simple and easiest way from hard drive partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.

[read more]
item.description:
NTFS File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
NTFS file recovery application is useful to retrieve corrupted photographs, wallpapers, screensaver, text file, images, audio, video, official document or other important files from all major types of hard drive including SATA, SCSI, ATA, IDE, EIDE. Data restoration software is capable to regain erased text file which run on various Windows tool like excel sheet, office word file, pdf file, ppt or other documents file in simple and easiest way from hard drive partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
NTFS File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
NTFS file recovery application is useful to retrieve corrupted photographs, wallpapers, screensaver, text file, images, audio, video, official document or other important files from all major types of hard drive including SATA, SCSI, ATA, IDE, EIDE. Data restoration software is capable to regain erased text file which run on various Windows tool like excel sheet, office word file, pdf file, ppt or other documents file in simple and easiest way from hard drive partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.

[read more]
